message:
feat(circuit-breaker): add operational telemetry counters to CircuitBreaker [ft-3kxe.15]

Add CircuitBreakerTelemetry with 6 counters (trips_total, resets_total,
half_open_probes, successes_recorded, failures_recorded, requests_rejected)
wired into allow(), record_success(), and record_failure(). Plain u64
since methods take &mut self.

Includes proptest_circuit_breaker_telemetry.rs with 10 unit tests and 6
property tests covering monotonicity, trips bounded by failures, resets
bounded by successes, and serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
